message:
perf(btree,connection): single-write quick-balance, lazy VDBE codegen, and hot-path instrumentation

Three interconnected performance improvements for batch INSERT workloads:

B-tree balance refactoring (balance.rs):
- Extract divider rowid calculation into quick_balance_divider_rowid()
  to separate concerns and enable pre-computation from cached state
- Create QuickBalanceResult struct returning the new page number, header,
  and cell pointers so the caller can populate the rightmost-leaf cache
  without re-reading the page
- Rename balance_quick() to balance_quick_known_divider_rowid() which
  performs in-memory page mutations and writes the parent page once
  instead of twice (eliminating a redundant parent page write per split)
- Mark insert_cell_into_page() as #[cfg(test)] since production code no
  longer uses it

Cursor append path improvements (cursor.rs):
- Replace store_rightmost_leaf_cache_from_page() with inline cache
  population after quick-balance, using data directly from
  QuickBalanceResult to avoid an extra page read
- Add timing instrumentation around 5 hot paths: fast table-leaf payload
  appends, full-cell appends, quick-balance attempts, local-split
  attempts, and generic nonroot rebalancing
- Use pre-computed divider rowid from rightmost-leaf cache when available

New instrumentation metrics (instrumentation.rs):
- Add atomic counters and snapshot fields for fast-payload appends,
  full-cell appends, quick-balance (attempts/hits/time), local-split
  (attempts/hits/time), nonroot rebalance (calls/time)
- Corresponding recording functions with profile-enabled guards

Prepared INSERT lazy compilation (connection.rs):
- Add clone_with_program() to reuse PreparedStatement with different VDBE
  programs without re-parsing the SQL
- Add execute_prepared_insert_table_program_after_direct_fallback() for
  lazy VDBE compilation only when the direct insert lane bails out
- Direct-compiled inserts now use placeholder programs instead of eager
  VDBE compilation, deferring the codegen cost until actually needed
- Optimize integer-to-text conversion with manual buffer-based digit
  conversion replacing write!() macro formatting
- Skip MemDatabase placeholder lookup when memdb_rows_loaded is true
  (common explicit-txn path)

Tests (fast_path_separation.rs):
- Add btree instrumentation to FastPathProfileTestGuard
- Extend manual_profile_large_prepared_direct_insert_single_txn_10k()
  with leaf-reuse metric reporting
- Add two new manual perf probes for lifecycle breakdown analysis
- Add regression test verifying lazy VDBE codegen skips eager compilation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
